Log:
  MFH: r545744

  sysutils/htop: Fix build with -fno-common

  Fix the build of sysutils/htop with -fno-common, which is the default in
  llvm 11 (and gcc 10)

  PR:		248823
  Submitted by:	Yasuhiro KIMURA

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (joenum, implicit, -fno-common fixes)
